title: The Architect

options.title: Continue/Respond/Answer
options.description: Advance through character-specific dialogue with The Architect. The text of the button varies depending on who is speaking and the context of the conversation.

options.title: Proceed
options.description: After dialogue concludes, end the encounter and win the run

conditions: Win condition encounter - appears after defeating The Architect in combat
Character-specific dialogue based on which character is being played
notes: [gold]Dialogue-driven encounter:[/gold] This is not a traditional event with choice-based consequences. Instead, it plays character-specific dialogue with The Architect after winning the combat encounter. Each character has unique dialogue trees with different branching depending on how many times that character has won the game and beaten The Architect. The dialogue options use contextual button text (Continue, Respond, Answer, Threaten, etc.) rather than fixed labels. After the final dialogue line, the player clicks Proceed to complete the run.
